summary_en: 425,000 shares (1.00% of S/O) | ¥550M upper limit | May 15 – June 15, 2026 | ToSTNeT-3 and open-market methods | Rationale: enhance shareholder returns and capital efficiency
title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of Treasury Stock Based on Articles of Incorporation Provisions under Company Law Article 165, Paragraph 2)
translation_en_brief: On May 14, 2026, Orion Breweries' Board of Directors resolved to acquire up to 425,000 common shares (1.00% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) for an upper limit of ¥550 million. The acquisition will be conducted in the open market during the period May 15 – June 15, 2026, using ToSTNeT-3 (off-hours trading) and regular exchange trading methods under a discretionary trading agreement. The company stated that the acquisition is undertaken to enhance shareholder returns and improve capital efficiency, based on a comprehensive assessment of equity ratio levels and business outlook.
